pages.name: Home / Landing
sections: Hero: Full-screen with smiling patient photo, headline, 'Book Appointment' CTA
Trust bar: patient count, years in practice, 5-star rating — animated counters
Services overview: 6-card grid with icons (cleaning, whitening, braces, implants, etc.)
Why choose us: 3-column feature blocks with icons
Doctor introduction: photo + credentials + quick bio
Testimonials: carousel with star ratings and patient photos
Before & after smile gallery: comparison slider

pages.name: Services
sections: Detailed service cards with pricing ranges

pages.name: About Us
sections: Doctor/team profiles with hover flip cards

pages.name: Booking / Appointment
sections: Step-form: choose service → choose doctor → pick date/time → patient info → confirmation

pages.name: FAQ
sections: Accordion by category: General, Procedures, Insurance, Payment

pages.name: Privacy Policy
sections: Full GDPR/PDPA compliant privacy policy content

gsap_animations: Hero: headline SplitText char-by-char entrance + patient photo scale-in
Trust bar: number counter from 0 when scrolled into view
Service cards: staggered fade-up on scroll (ScrollTrigger batch)
Before/after slider: reveal animation on scroll enter
Testimonials: horizontal marquee using GSAP ticker
Sticky navbar: shrink + blur-backdrop on scroll
Booking form: smooth step transitions with GSAP timeline
Lenis: global smooth scroll with damping 0.1, lerp 0.05
key_features: Google Maps embed with styled map
Mobile-responsive hamburger nav with GSAP drawer
